message:
feat: Add precise error types analysis for smaller error unions

Track specific Python exception types (KeyError, IndexError, ValueError, etc.)
to generate precise Zig error unions like error{KeyError,IndexError}!T
instead of generic anyerror!T.

Added:
- PreciseError enum mapping Python exceptions to Zig errors
- ErrorSet packed struct with merge() and toZigErrorSet()
- error_types field in FunctionTraits
- getErrorSet() query API
- Detection for subscript (KeyError/IndexError), raise, and error functions

This enables smaller error sets, better exhaustive error handling,
and eliminates impossible catch branches at compile time.
